sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13804" key="a)posta/lagma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποστάλ-αγμα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[τᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n13804.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπόσταγμα, αἰγείρων</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:397" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">397</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
